mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_context_artifact (artifact_id, run_id, root_run_id, conversation_id, kind, storage_uri, preview, sha256, original_chars, retained_chars, create_time) VALUES (#{artifactId}, #{runId}, #{rootRunId}, #{conversationId}, #{kind}, #{storageUri}, #{preview}, #{sha256}, #{originalChars}, #{retainedChars}, COALESCE(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
